# Dream On The Paper

Dream On The Paper creates personalized visual-only dream visualization wallpapers based on a customer's goals, dreams, emotions, color preferences, visual style, and device format.

The product generates calm, premium, eye-friendly visual wallpapers for phones, tablets, desktops, laptops, and custom sizes.

Important product behavior:
- The wallpaper is visual-only.
- Generated wallpapers do not include quotes, affirmations, typography, logos, watermarks, or text inside the image.
- Customers answer guided questions about their future life, goals, emotions, scenes, colors, style, and device.
- A low-resolution preview may be shown before purchase.
- Paid customers receive a clean high-resolution PNG download.

## Public pages

- Home: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/
- Create wallpaper: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/create
- Examples: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/examples
- About: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/about
- Contact: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/terms
- Refund Policy: https://www.dreamonthepaper.com/refund-policy

## Product summary

Dream On The Paper is a digital wallpaper generation service. It helps customers create a personalized visual reminder of the life they are building.

Common customer goals include:
- peaceful home
- financial freedom
- successful business
- loving family life
- travel
- healthy lifestyle
- calm mind
- creative freedom
- romantic life
- powerful career
- spiritual alignment

Common visual styles include:
- minimal and clean
- luxury aesthetic
- soft feminine
- cinematic realistic
- cozy warm lifestyle
- dreamy and magical
- modern editorial
- nature-inspired
- elegant vision board collage
- calm spiritual aesthetic
- high-end Pinterest style
- soft luxury realism

## Important restrictions

Generated images should not contain text, quotes, affirmations, typography, logos, watermarks, readable symbols, or brand names.

Private pages, API routes, checkout sessions, customer orders, and generated wallpaper files are not intended for indexing.
